case_title: ALEKSANDR BELITSKIY et al VS. PAK PING YEUNG et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELITSKIY, ALEKSANDR BELITSKAYA, SVETLANA ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 7.0 DAYS

NOTICE OF MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ON DEC-17-2010 AT 2:30 PM IN DEPARTMENT 210. NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, JURY TRIAL SET FOR JAN-03-2011 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON JUL-02-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY ATTORNEY BRUSIL, ILONA
MEDIATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-22-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR - DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DISCOVERY 610, PLAINTIFF ALEKSANDR BELITSKIY AND SVETLANA BELITSKAYA'S MOTION FOR ORDER QUASHING, MODIFYING, OR LIMITING DEPOSITION SUBPOENA FOR PRODUCTION OF BUSINESS RECORDS IS GRANTED AS IT SEEKS AN ORDER MODIFYING THE SUBPOENA. THE SUBPOENA IS LIMITED TO MEDICAL RECORDS FOR THE TREATMENT FOR SLEEPLESS NIGHTS, HEADACHES, WORRIES, FRUSTRATION, CANKER SORES, AND COUGHING CAUSED BY PLAINTIFFS' COMPLAINTS OF MOLD AND/OR FUNGUS IN THEIR APARTMENT FOR THE PERIOD MARCH 2007 THROUGH NOVEMBER 2008. PLAINTIFFS' REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT. NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Quashing, Modifying , Or Limiting Deposition Subpoena For Production Of Business Records And For Sanctions [Ccp 1987.1]
Off Calendar May-11-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF ALEKSANDR BELITSKIY and SVETLANA BELITSKAYA's Motion For Order Quashing, Modifying, Or Limiting Deposition Subpoena For Production Of Business Records is granted as it seeks an order modifying the subpoena. The subpoena is limited to medical records for the treatment for sleepless nights, headaches, worries, frustration, canker sores, and coughing caused by plaintiffs' complaints of mold and/or fungus in their apartment for the period March 2007 through November 2008. Plaintiffs' request for sanctions is denied. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.
